methodology.title: How we verify suppliers
methodology.subtitle: Transparency in our methodology builds trust. Here's how we ensure data integrity.
methodology.step1.title: Data collection
methodology.step1.desc: We aggregate supplier data from trade registries, certifications, and verified business sources. Continuously refreshed global supplier graph.
methodology.step2.title: Verification
methodology.step2.desc: Each supplier undergoes business registration checks, trade history validation, and compliance review. Registry-backed, compliance-grade.
methodology.step3.title: Quality scoring
methodology.step3.desc: Suppliers are scored on response time, certification level, and buyer feedback using structured, registry-informed signals. Operator-calibrated, high-signal.
methodology.step4.title: Ongoing monitoring
methodology.step4.desc: We continuously monitor risk signals and update supplier status based on real-time data. Verified, registry-backed intelligence.
integrationsPage.title: Connect SmartSeek with Your Stack
integrationsPage.subtitle: Sync suppliers, RFQs, and landed costs with your procurement and ERP systems. One-click OAuth, secure API, and pre-built connectors.
integrationsPage.supportedDesc: Connect your existing procurement tools. Data stays in sync automatically.
integrationsPage.step1Desc: Select SAP Ariba, Oracle, Salesforce, or others from the list.
integrationsPage.step2Desc: OAuth 2.0 flow—no passwords shared. Enterprise SSO supported.
integrationsPage.step3Desc: Suppliers, RFQs, and cost data flow between systems in real time.
integrationsPage.securityDesc: Buyer and supplier data is handled confidentially. TLS in transit, encryption at rest. SOC 2 attestation is in progress — we do not claim certifications we have not completed.

trustPage.title: How SmartSeek earns buyer trust
trustPage.subtitle: Industrial procurement runs on accountability. Here's exactly what we verify, how we route requests, and what we deliberately do not do.
trustPage.verifyTitle: What we verify before publishing a supplier
trustPage.verify1: Legal entity exists in an official company registry (e.g. SAIC, Companies House, SEC EDGAR, Handelsregister, MERSIS, ASIC, KRS, DART, SEDAR).
trustPage.verify2: Registered company name, registration number, country, and incorporation date match registry records.
trustPage.verify3: Operational website resolves and is associated with the entity.
trustPage.verify4: Primary contact email is reachable and tied to the company domain or a verified representative.
trustPage.rfqBody: Every RFQ submitted on SmartSeek is reviewed by the SmartSeek sourcing team before it leaves the platform. We screen for completeness, regulatory red flags, and supplier match — and only then route the request to suppliers we have verified for that commodity. We do not auto-blast RFQs.
trustPage.sources2Rest: customs and shipment records where lawfully available.
trustPage.sources4Rest: suppliers added by our team after manual due diligence.
trustPage.sourcesFootnote: During beta, the public directory shows a curated subset of our internal supplier index. We deliberately do not display unverified bulk records.
trustPage.notDo1: We do not sell paid placement. Suppliers cannot pay to rank higher.
trustPage.notDo2: We do not generate fake supplier profiles, fake reviews, or fake quote counts.
trustPage.notDo3: We do not auto-blast RFQs to thousands of suppliers.
trustPage.notDo4: We do not share buyer details with third parties without explicit consent.
trustPage.notDo5: We do not claim to be the "world's largest" anything. Our credibility comes from verification, not scale.
trustPage.reportText: If you see a listing that looks wrong, tell us. We act on every report.
verificationPage.title: Three verification tiers
verificationPage.subtitle: Every supplier badge on SmartSeek means a specific, auditable thing. No vanity stars. No mystery rankings.
verificationPage.tier1.name: Registry Verified
verificationPage.tier1.summary: Legal entity confirmed in an official company registry.
verificationPage.tier1.req1: Match between company name, registry number, and country
verificationPage.tier1.req2: Active, non-dissolved status at time of verification
verificationPage.tier1.req4: Primary contact reachable on a domain-tied or verified address
verificationPage.tier2.name: Trade Verified
verificationPage.tier2.summary: Active export/import activity confirmed via lawful trade-data sources.
verificationPage.tier2.req2: Confirmed shipping records or customs filings within the last 24 months
verificationPage.tier2.req3: Product lines listed match shipped HS codes
verificationPage.tier3.name: Team Verified
verificationPage.tier3.summary: Manual due-diligence by the SmartSeek sourcing team.
verificationPage.tier3.req2: Direct call/video meeting with a named representative
verificationPage.tier3.req3: Proof of capability supplied (mill test certs, ISO certs, recent invoices, factory media)
verificationPage.tier3.req4: Two-step contact verification (email + phone or registered office)
verificationPage.cadence1: Registry status is checked on listing and re-checked every 12 months. Trade verification refreshes every 6 months. Operator-verified suppliers undergo an annual due-diligence review.
verificationPage.cadence2: When we cannot re-confirm status, the badge is downgraded or the supplier is hidden until status is restored.
verificationPage.ctaText: Suppliers can apply to be listed and verified.
methodologyPage.title: How we route a sourcing request
methodologyPage.subtitle: SmartSeek uses sourcing-team review. Every RFQ is reviewed by the SmartSeek sourcing team before it reaches a supplier.
methodologyPage.step1.title: RFQ intake & screening
methodologyPage.step1.body: When a buyer submits an RFQ, the SmartSeek sourcing team reviews it for completeness — commodity specification, quantity, destination, lead time, regulatory constraints — within one business day. Incomplete RFQs are returned with specific clarification questions.
methodologyPage.step2.title: Supplier matching
methodologyPage.step2.body: We match the request to suppliers in our verified directory based on commodity, geography, certification requirements, and historical responsiveness. We deliberately do not blast — most RFQs are routed to between 3 and 8 suppliers.
methodologyPage.step3.title: Quote consolidation
methodologyPage.step3.body: Suppliers respond directly to the buyer or via the operator. Quotes are returned to the buyer with consistent fields: unit price, MOQ, incoterms, lead time, payment terms, and supplier provenance. The buyer chooses who to engage.
methodologyPage.step4.title: Post-quote support
methodologyPage.step4.body: We assist with reference checks, sample requests, contract review pointers, and (where useful) trade documentation. SmartSeek does not act as a broker or take a commission on the trade.
methodologyPage.notDo1: We do not auto-blast RFQs to thousands of suppliers.
methodologyPage.notDo2: We do not insert ourselves into supplier-buyer commercial communication unless asked.
methodologyPage.notDo3: We do not take a hidden commission on the underlying trade.
methodologyPage.notDo4: We do not promise quotes from suppliers we have not verified.
methodologyPage.ctaSubtitle: Submit an RFQ — there's no payment system during beta.

Listings are free during beta. Each application is reviewed manually and verified against company registry records.
becomeSupplier.cards.verifyBody: We confirm legal entity status against an official company registry before listing.
becomeSupplier.cards.nopayBody: We don't sell placement. Listing is based on verification, not budget.
becomeSupplier.cards.rfqBody: Buyer requests are screened by an operator and routed only to relevant suppliers.
becomeSupplier.sections.registryDesc: We verify against an official registry. Provide your number — we'll cross-check.
becomeSupplier.actions.footnote: By submitting, you confirm the information is accurate. We may contact you for registry documents or certificates before publishing your listing.
about.title: About SmartSeek
about.subtitle: Built by operators who experienced fragmented supplier trust firsthand. SmartSeek is a procurement sourcing platform for industrial buyers—registry verification, structured RFQs, and sourcing-team routing where marketplaces default to volume.
about.mission1: SmartSeek helps procurement teams discover registry-verified suppliers, submit structured RFQs, and receive operator-reviewed quotes with MOQ, lead time, and Incoterms. Metals and industrial materials are a core strength—not the only category we support.
about.mission2: We built SmartSeek after seeing the same failure modes repeat in cross-border trade: scraped profiles presented as verified, RFQs blasted to unqualified contacts, and registry records treated as proof of supply capability. Our response is registry-first verification, specification-driven intake, and routing by the SmartSeek sourcing team—not algorithmic marketplace matching.
about.procurersDesc: Industrial buyers running structured RFQs across metals, manufacturing inputs, chemicals, packaging, and machinery.
about.suppliersDesc: Manufacturers, traders, and distributors who want qualified RFQs—not marketplace spam.
about.foundersIntro: SmartSeek was founded by practitioners with hands-on cross-border industrial sourcing and trade operations experience across Turkey, CIS, ASEAN, China, and the United States—not by a listing-volume marketplace team.
about.founder1Focus: Cross-border industrial sourcing · supplier qualification · RFQ structure
about.founder1Bio: Background in cross-border procurement of industrial materials and components. Work spans supplier discovery, registry-backed qualification, and the operational gap between a public company record and a supplier you can actually place an order with—across Turkey, CIS, ASEAN, China, and the US.
about.founder2Focus: Trade operations · verification discipline · international RFQ execution
about.founder2Bio: Background in trade and procurement operations with emphasis on verification discipline, supplier network development, and international RFQ mechanics—from specification intake and registry checks through quote normalization with MOQ, lead time, and Incoterms.
about.antiMarketplace: We do not scrape directories at scale, auto-blast RFQs, or publish suppliers we cannot locate in a public registry. The SmartSeek sourcing team reviews each request before routing it. That is slower than a marketplace—and more useful to a procurement team.
about.values.integrityDesc: Every published supplier is anchored to a public company registry. We show provenance—not marketing badges.
about.values.globalDesc: Built for buyers sourcing across regions, incoterms, and specification regimes—not a single domestic directory.
about.values.rfqDesc: RFQs are screened and routed by the SmartSeek sourcing team. No mass outreach. No proxy theatre.
about.trustStripLabel: How SmartSeek earns trust during beta
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with our team. We're here to help procurers, entrepreneurs, suppliers, and producers succeed.
contact.sendMessageDesc: For sales inquiries, support, or partnership opportunities, reach out via email. We typically respond within 24 hours.
contact.browseFirst: Prefer to browse first? Check our
pricing.errors.required: Name and work email are required.
pricing.banner: Free during beta · Founding users program
pricing.title: SmartSeek is free during beta
pricing.subtitle: We're onboarding a small group of procurement teams. There is no payment system during beta. Founding users get priority sourcing support and locked-in pricing when we launch paid plans.
pricing.noCard: No credit card. No upgrade prompts. No usage caps during beta.
pricing.cardDesc: For procurement teams sourcing industrial materials, manufacturing inputs, chemicals, packaging, machinery, and specialty metals.
pricing.feature3: SmartSeek sourcing team screens and routes every RFQ
pricing.feature5: Direct SmartSeek sourcing team support via email
pricing.feature6: Locked-in founding-user pricing when paid plans launch
pricing.reviewNote: We accept founding users on a rolling basis. Most applications are reviewed within one business day.
pricing.requestDesc: Tell us briefly what you source. We'll get back to you with onboarding details.
pricing.successDesc: We'll reach out from sourcing@smartseek.com within one business day.

pricing.footnote: Submitting this form is not a contract. We'll only use your details to contact you about beta onboarding.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your data.
privacy.p1: SmartSeek ("we") respects your privacy. This policy describes the data we collect when you use our platform and how we use it.
privacy.dataBody: We collect account information (email, name), usage data (searches, reports), and RFQ details you submit. SmartSeek is free during beta and does not process payments at this stage.
privacy.useBody: We use your data to provide the service, improve our platform, and communicate with you. We do not sell your data to third parties.
privacy.contactBody: For privacy inquiries, contact us at contact@smartseek.com.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Terms governing your use of SmartSeek.
terms.p1: By using SmartSeek, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.
terms.acceptableUseBody: You agree to use the platform for lawful business purposes only. You will not misuse the service, attempt to access other users' data, or violate applicable laws.
terms.billingBody: SmartSeek is free during beta. If paid plans are introduced later, billing terms will be published before any charges are enabled.
terms.contactBody: For questions about these terms, contact us at contact@smartseek.com.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about SmartSeek, our platform, and how we can help procurers, entrepreneurs, suppliers, and producers.
home.hero.banner: Free during beta · Procurement pilot cohort open
home.hero.subtitle: Discover verified suppliers across industrial materials, manufacturing, chemicals, packaging, and machinery. Submit an RFQ and receive structured quotes with MOQ, lead time, and Incoterms from qualified suppliers.
home.hero.builtFor: Built for industrial procurement teams handling specification-driven sourcing workflows.
home.how.title: Procurement workflow without marketplace noise
home.how.step1Desc: Describe what you need: commodity, specification, quantity, destination, lead time. Takes 2 minutes.
home.how.step2Desc: The SmartSeek sourcing team screens your RFQ and routes it only to suppliers verified against public company registries.
home.how.step3Desc: Quotes arrive with incoterms, lead time, MOQ, and supplier provenance. You decide who to engage.
home.why.title: No scraped profiles. No mass blasts. No marketplace theatre.
home.why.body: Every supplier we publish is checked against a company registry — SAIC, Companies House, SEC EDGAR, Handelsregister, MERSIS, ASIC, KRS, DART, SEDAR — and confirmed via direct contact. RFQs are routed by the SmartSeek sourcing team, not by an algorithm.
home.founding.body: We're onboarding a focused set of procurement teams during beta so each account receives direct sourcing support and faster supplier routing.
home.preview.lockBody: Beta sourcing access with procurement-team onboarding. Request access to browse verified suppliers.
home.sections.previewTitle: Verified suppliers across industries and global markets
home.sections.previewBody: A sample of registry-verified suppliers across metals, manufacturing, chemicals, packaging, and machinery. Curated directory access for founding users during beta.
home.founding.noPayment: No credit card. No payment system during beta.
home.seo.description: Procurement sourcing platform with registry-verified suppliers, structured RFQs, and strong metals expertise.
verificationPage.reviewNotice: Documentation last reviewed: May 2026. Verification tiers and registry requirements may be updated as operator procedures evolve.
sampleReport.title: Illustrative sourcing workflow example
sampleReport.disclaimer: This page shows the structure of a SmartSeek RFQ workflow only. It is not a live client deliverable. No supplier names, prices, ratings, margins, or compliance conclusions are represented here.
sampleReport.exampleSpec: 304 grade, 2B finish, thickness per buyer drawing
sampleReport.exampleQuantity: Trial lot — quantity confirmed with buyer
sampleReport.exampleIncoterm: CIF — to be confirmed in structured quote
sampleReport.exampleNote: Real deliverables include registry provenance, operator routing notes, and comparable quote fields—not projected margins or star ratings.
sampleReport.workflowTitle: How a request moves through SmartSeek
sampleReport.step1Desc: Buyer submits commodity, specification, quantity, destination, lead time, and any regulatory constraints through a specification-first form.
sampleReport.step2Desc: The SmartSeek sourcing team checks completeness, validates registry context where applicable, and routes only to suppliers verified for the commodity—no auto-blast outreach.
sampleReport.step3Desc: Returned quotes are structured with MOQ, lead time, Incoterms, and supplier provenance so procurement can compare on comparable fields.
sampleReport.closing: When a real anonymized sourcing memo is available, it will replace this structural example. Until then, submit an RFQ or review our methodology for the operator workflow.
sampleReport.footer: Illustrative example only. Not investment, legal, or compliance advice.
rfq.form.howItWorksBody: Submit your product requirements below. The SmartSeek sourcing team will share your RFQ with relevant verified suppliers. You'll receive competitive quotes via email within 1–3 business days—no account required. Your data is never shared with third parties.

faq.sections.general.title: General
faq.sections.general.a1: SmartSeek is an industrial sourcing platform for procurement teams. Buyers discover registry-verified suppliers, submit RFQs, and compare structured quotes across industrial categories.
faq.sections.general.a2: Search by commodity, category, and region, then review curated supplier profiles. For specific demand, submit an RFQ — our sourcing team routes it to relevant verified suppliers.
faq.sections.general.a3: Yes. SmartSeek is free during beta. No payment flow is enabled.
faq.sections.suppliers.title: Suppliers
faq.sections.suppliers.a1: Every published supplier is matched to an official company registry (e.g. SAIC, Companies House, SEC EDGAR, Handelsregister, MERSIS, ASIC). See /verification for criteria and re-verification cadence.
faq.sections.suppliers.q2: How many suppliers are in the public directory?
faq.sections.suppliers.a2: During beta, the public directory is intentionally curated — not scraped at scale. It spans industrial materials, manufacturing, chemicals, packaging, and machinery. If a supplier isn't listed, submit an RFQ and our team searches the internal index and verified network.
faq.sections.suppliers.a3: Major industrial sourcing regions including China, India, Vietnam, Turkey, Indonesia, Thailand, South Korea, Japan, Poland, Germany, the UK, the US, Mexico, Brazil, Australia, and Canada. We do not publish unverified bulk records.
faq.sections.landedCost.title: Landed cost
faq.sections.landedCost.q1: How accurate is the landed cost calculator?
faq.sections.landedCost.a1: The calculator uses duty rates, freight benchmarks, and insurance formulas. Accuracy depends on your inputs — verify critical figures with customs brokers or freight forwarders for high-value shipments.
faq.sections.landedCost.a2: Common incoterms including EXW, FOB, CIF, and DDP. The calculator adjusts freight, insurance, and customs handling based on the selected incoterm.
faq.sections.landedCost.a3: Sea freight (FCL and LCL), air freight, and express shipping. Specify container sizes (20ft, 40ft) for sea freight estimates.
faq.sections.rfq.title: RFQ
faq.sections.rfq.q1: How does the RFQ process work?
faq.sections.rfq.a1: Submit an RFQ with product details, quantity, and requirements. Our team routes it to relevant verified suppliers. Quotes return with MOQ, lead time, and Incoterms where applicable.
faq.sections.rfq.q2: How quickly will I get quotes?
faq.sections.rfq.a2: Most RFQs receive first responses within 1–3 business days, depending on product complexity and supplier availability.
faq.sections.rfq.a3: Contact and RFQ details are shared only with suppliers we route your request to. We do not sell your data. See our Privacy Policy for details.
faq.sections.account.title: Account
faq.sections.account.q1: How do I create an account?
faq.sections.account.a1: Click Sign Up, enter your work email and password, then verify your email to activate your account.
faq.sections.account.a2: There is no billing during beta. If paid plans are introduced, cancellation terms will be published in advance.
faq.sections.account.a3: Payments are not enabled during beta.
faq.sections.trust.title: Trust & security
faq.sections.trust.a1: Buyer and supplier data is treated as confidential. Communications use TLS, data is encrypted at rest, and RFQs are only shared with routed suppliers. SOC 2 attestation work is in progress.
faq.sections.trust.a2: Industrial procurement teams, traders, manufacturers, and verified suppliers. Built for cross-border sourcing operations — from single-category RFQs to multi-region supply programs.
